title: dianthus zonatus var. aristatus
intro: Dianthus zonatus var. aristatus, also known as the Fringed Pink, is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is a perennial herb with pink or white flowers that have fringed petals, used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues, including digestive problems and wounds. Dianthus zonatus var. aristatus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in skincare products due to its antiseptic and antioxidant properties.
